note_main_file: id=10 Improved Heroic Strike (spec_tree=-1) — flags=[2,0,0] WRONG → CORRECTED to [64,0,0]=0x00000040 (mask0 bit6). Heroic Strike bit6, not bit1.
id=11 Improved Rend (spec_tree=-1) — flags=[32,0,0] CONFIRMED CORRECT via .spellinfo all 772.
id=12 Improved Overpower (spec_tree=-1) — flags=[4,0,0] CONFIRMED CORRECT via .spellinfo all 7384. Also fixed value_per_rank 25→2500 (100=1% convention).
id=13 Improved Mortal Strike (spec_tree=-1) — flags=[0,0,2048] COMPLETELY WRONG → CORRECTED to [33554432,0,0]=0x02000000 (mask0 bit25). Original mask2 bit11 matched nothing.
_notes.note_no_shared_bits: No shared Warrior family marker bits across all verified carrier spells. No exclusions required.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Heroic Strike
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[64,0,0]=0x00000040 (mask0 bit6). Heroic Strike rage cost -1/rank. Rage stored 10x internally (15 rage = ManaCost 150), so COST FLAT value is -10 per rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Deflection (5r, tier 1) — Increases parry chance by 1%/rank. Passive stat, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Charge
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[1,0,0]=0x00000001 (mask0 bit0). No shared Warrior marker bits. Charge cooldown -2s/rank (COOLDOWN FLAT: -2000ms).

talent_affixes._todo: Iron Will (3r, tier 2) — Reduces the duration of stun/immobilize/disarm effects. Mechanic resistance, not implementable as SpellMod.
Tactical Mastery (3r, tier 2) — Retain up to 25 rage when changing stances. Passive stance mechanic, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Overpower
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[4,0,0]=0x00000004 (mask0 bit2). Overpower crit chance +25%/rank (CRIT_CHANCE FLAT: 2500=25%).

talent_affixes._todo: Anger Management (1r, tier 3) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Deep Wounds (3r, tier 4) — Your melee crits cause the target to bleed for additional damage. Proc-based DoT, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Slam
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[2097152,0,0]=0x00200000 (mask0 bit21). No shared Warrior marker bits. Slam cast time -0.5s/rank (CASTING_TIME FLAT: -500ms).

talent_affixes._todo: Two-Handed Weapon Specialization (3r, tier 4) — Increases damage done with two-handed weapons by 2/4/6%. Passive melee damage, not implementable as SpellMod.
Impale (2r, tier 5) — Increases melee critical strike damage bonus by 10/20%. SPELLMOD_CRIT_DAMAGE_BONUS applies to spell crits only, not melee — not implementable as SpellMod.
Taste for Blood (3r, tier 5) — Your Rend periodic damage has a chance to allow use of Overpower. Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.
Sudden Death (3r, tier 6) — Your melee hits have a chance to allow your next Execute to cost no rage. Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.
Mortal Strike (1r, tier 6) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Strength of Arms (2r, tier 7) — Increases total Strength and Stamina by 3/6%. Passive stat, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Unrelenting Assault
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[1028,0,0]: OR of Overpower(7384) mask0 bit2(0x4=4)|Revenge(6572) mask0 bit10(0x400=1024). No shared Warrior marker bits. Overpower/Revenge cooldown -2s/rank (COOLDOWN FLAT: -2000ms).

talent_affixes._todo: Weapon Expertise (2r, tier 8) — Increases expertise by 4/8. Passive stat, not implementable as SpellMod.
Trauma (2r, tier 8) — Your bleed effects are 15/30% stronger. Passive bleed multiplier applied at a mechanic level, not implementable as SpellMod.
Juggernaut (1r, tier 9) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Sweeping Strikes (1r, tier 9) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Wrecking Crew (5r, tier 10) — Melee crits apply Enrage granting 7/14/20/25/30% melee damage. Proc-based buff, not implementable as SpellMod.
Bladestorm (1r, tier 11) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
